text: Born to Rex and Laverne Smith in Ruidoso, New Mexico.

Founded Aqua Engineering, Inc. in Colorado and served as President & CEO for 34 years. Built a national reputation for designs that wrestled with water and energy conservation, developed proprietary software for irrigation system management, and won consulting contracts — foreign and domestic — covering seepage loss investigations, consumptive use studies, SCADA and control system design, and weather station networks.
Published Landscape Irrigation: Design and Management (John Wiley & Sons) — a definitive textbook in the field.
Joined the board of Louden Irrigating Canal & Reservoir Company. Later served as Vice President, helping modernize the company's canal infrastructure and reservoir operations.
Served as National President of the Irrigation Association.

Founded Wade Water LLC, consulting on SCADA, water delivery efficiency, and irrigation design. Ongoing work spans Regenesis Management Group (SWIIM® technology under two patents), Walt Disney Imagineering, SCADA design guidelines for the U.S. Forest Service, and participation with the International Standards Organization on control and management standards.
Received the Roy Williams Memorial Award from the American Society of Irrigation Consultants.
Joined the board of the Fort Collins–Loveland Irrigation District.
